nextAction: Phase 17 (§22.7 prompt 17): polish + E2E test suite — final phase. (1) Playwright e2e tests (npm run test:e2e): auth setup + core journeys as specs: login/logout, PR create→submit→approve (signed), PO from PR + contract price autofill, GRN with lot → stock, goods issue FEFO, payment request verify-gate, vendor bank dual control block, SoD refusals, API 401/200, exception register; use the seeded users; make tests idempotent via npm run seed in globalSetup. (2) Polish sweep: empty states verified, mobile card tables on key registers (spot check), 404/error pages, loading states. (3) FINAL-REPORT.md summarizing the whole build (17 phases, architecture, controls, portal integration pointer, deferred backlog consolidated). (4) Update README.md quickstart. npm run check + full test:e2e green + Phase Report + commit phase-17. THEN mark the build COMPLETE in .build-state.json (phase: 'DONE').
